An error occurred: ❌ Der opstod en fejl. Prøv igen senere.
Available commands:
📖 Tilgængelige kommandoer:

/start - Start, og tilknyt din konto
/status - Tjek tilknytningsstatus
/help - Vis hjælp
Invalid or expired token: ❌ Ugyldigt eller udløbet token. Generér et nyt link i appen.
No account linked: ❌ Ingen konto tilknyttet. Brug linket fra webappen.
Break-in attempt detected. Check your ve: Indbrudsforsøg registreret. Tjek dit køretøj med det samme!
This token has expired: ⏰ Dette token er udløbet. Generér et nyt link i appen.
Welcome to SentryGuard Bot:
🚗 Velkommen til SentryGuard-botten!

For at tilknytte din konto skal du bruge linket i webappen.
Your account is linked and active!: ✅ Din konto er tilknyttet og aktiv!
Your SentryGuard account has been linked:
✅ Din SentryGuard-konto er blevet tilknyttet!

Du vil nu modtage køretøjsalarmer her.
By signing or accepting this form, you c: By signing or accepting this form, you consent to the processing of your Personal Data by SentryGuardOrg ("Partner") in the context of the Partner's application titled SentryGuard (the "App").
Partner is the data controller responsib: Partner is the data controller responsible for the processing of your Personal Data in the context of the App.
By signing or accepting this form, you a: By signing or accepting this form, you also acknowledge receipt of the Tesla Customer Privacy Notice available at
(\"Tesla Privacy Notice\") and consent t: ("Tesla Privacy Notice") and consent to processing of Personal Data by Tesla in accordance with the Tesla Privacy Notice.
The App allows you to benefit from advan: The App allows you to benefit from advanced monitoring and notification features based on your Tesla vehicle's Sentry Mode, including the identification and logging of security events (such as event detection, Sentry Mode alerts, and break-in attempt monitoring), and the ability to configure automated deterrent actions (such as honking the horn) upon detection of these events.
Partner does not access or process other: Partner does not access or process other categories of data from your vehicle (e.g., detailed driving data, battery or precise location information). The authorization to send commands (such as honking the horn) is optional and is only requested if you choose to enable the Offensive Response deterrent feature.
Partner maintains administrative, techni: Partner maintains administrative, technical, and physical safeguards designed to protect Personal Data against accidental, unlawful or unauthorized destruction, loss, alteration, access, disclosure or use, including encryption of data in transit and, where appropriate, at rest. Partner will only retain your Personal Data for as long as necessary to provide you with the App and the features described above, unless otherwise required or authorized by applicable law or if you request early deletion.
The App is provided \"as is\" and \"as a: The App is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranty of any kind. SentryGuard and its authors disclaim all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, including but not limited to vehicle damage, loss of data, or service interruptions, arising out of the use of or inability to use the App. The user assumes sole and full responsibility for the use of the App and any automated actions configured (such as honking the horn).
Subject to applicable law (including GDP:
Subject to applicable law (including GDPR), you may have the right to request access and receive information about your Personal Data, update and correct inaccuracies, and request deletion when legal conditions are met. You also have the right to withdraw your consent at any time, without cost, which may however limit or prevent use of the App.

To exercise your rights, withdraw your consent or obtain more information about the App and the processing of your Personal Data, you can contact Partner at: hello@sentryguard.org.
By accepting this consent, you also agre: By accepting this consent, you also agree to receive occasional emails from Partner regarding product updates, new features, security alerts, and important service announcements. You can unsubscribe from these communications at any time via the unsubscribe link included in each email.
I consent to the collection, use, and pr: I consent to the collection, use, and processing of my Personal Data as described above.
welcomeEmailSubject: Din adgang til SentryGuard er blevet godkendt!
welcomeEmailBody:
Din konto er blevet godkendt!

Hej {{name}},

Gode nyheder! Din SentryGuard-konto er blevet godkendt. Du kan nu logge ind og begynde at overvåge Sentry Mode på dit Tesla-køretøj i realtid.

Kom godt i gang

Vores opsætningsguide leder dig trin for trin gennem konfigurationen.

💙 Støt SentryGuard

Hvis du finder SentryGuard nyttigt, så overvej at støtte projektet:

⭐ Giv os en stjerne på GitHub☕ Giv os en kop kaffe💬 Bliv en del af vores Discord

Ingen GitHub-konto? Intet problem! Det er 100 % gratis og tager 2 minutter: opret en konto, og klik på ⭐ ovenfor. Det hjælper os virkelig med at sprede budskabet!

Tak for din tålmodighed og din interesse for SentryGuard!

SentryGuard-teamet

telegramLinkedFollowUp:
✅ Perfekt! Dit Telegram er nu tilknyttet.

📋 Næste trin:
• Opsæt en virtuel nøgle i Tesla-appen
• Aktivér telemetriovervågning

👉 Vend tilbage til SentryGuard for at fortsætte opsætningen.
muteAlreadyActive:
🔕 Alarmerne er slået fra i {{duration}} endnu.

Hvad vil du gøre?
botUpdateV1: 🆕 SentryGuard er blevet opdateret! Du kan nu administrere dine alarmindstillinger direkte fra menuen nedenfor. • 📊 Min status — Se din konfiguration • 🔕 Sluk for alarmer — Sæt notifikationer på pause midlertidigt
offensiveNoVehicles: 🚫 Ingen køretøjer registreret endnu. Aktivér overvågning først.
offensiveTestDisabled: Aktivér en offensiv respons, før du tester.
offensiveError: ❌ Fejl ved opdatering af offensiv respons
